title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 429.500 - Refusal of parties to satisfy — penalty
text:
429.500.  Refusal of parties to satisfy — penalty. — If any creditor refuse to enter satisfaction within ten days after payment and request as aforesaid, he shall be liable to any person injured to the amount of such injury and costs of suit.
(RSMo 1939 § 3605) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3215; 1919 § 7275; 1909 § 8263
